name: fiveagents-link
description: Marketing agent — research, create, design, analyze, publish content for any brand

fiveagents_api_key.description: Your fiveagents.io API key (fa_live_... — from admin dashboard)

default_brand.description: Your primary brand name (must match a folder in brands/)

slack_notify_user.description: Your Slack user ID for notifications (e.g. U07QR52R342)

report_email.description: Email address for daily/weekly marketing reports

late_api_key.description: Late API key for social media publishing (from getlate.dev)

gemini_api_key.description: Google Gemini API key for image generation

argil_api_key.description: Argil API key for AI avatar videos (optional)

meta_ads_token.description: Meta Marketing API access token (optional — for paid ads analysis)

meta_ad_account_id.description: Meta Ad Account ID, e.g. act_123456 (optional)

ga4_property_id.description: Google Analytics 4 property ID (optional — for funnel analysis)

ga4_sa_key_path.description: Path to GA4 service account JSON key file (optional)

dataforseo_login.description: DataforSEO login email (optional — for keyword research)

notion_api_key.description: Notion API key (for direct API calls if Notion MCP unavailable)
